creator: mkbsdportaug06@oldach.net
text:
Erwin Lansing:
> On Wed, Aug 09, 2006 at 08:32:31AM +0200, Helge Oldach wrote:
> > Ooops, the patch was broken.
> > 
> > Here's a corrected one that I have tested and it actually works.
> > 
> Hi Helge,
> 
> I just had a quick glance at your patch and it looks similar to the one
> included in http://gabor.t-hosting.hu/patches/destdir_fix.diff which is
> currently being tested. Can you confirm that that patch works?

Yep, it does work and is virtually identical (for this bug). But there
is a minor style glitch in Gábor's patch - he doesn't use ECHO_MSG
consistently:

		if [ -z "${DESTDIR}" ] ; then \
			${ECHO_CMD} "===>   Registering installation for ${PKGNAME}"; \
		else \
			${ECHO_MSG} "===>   Registering installation for ${PKGNAME} in ${DESTDIR}"; \
		fi; \

${ECHO_CMD} should actually be ${ECHO_MSG} here.

Helge
